title: Video by floorballzone17
description:
For the goalies out there! 
Clip 1: Two players shoot nearly at the same time. Not hard but exact. 
Clip 2: Goalie looks off the player, signal from the player, shoot. Then the other side.
Clip 3: Goalie lies on the ground, signal, shoot.

Hitting the goal is important every time! 
#goalie #exercise #training #drill #hit #exact #floorball #getbetter #reflexes #fz17 #trythisathome
